basics.name: Nikhil Venkatraman
basics.label: Engineering Manager • UI Platform & Design Systems

summary: Engineering manager and design systems leader with 10+ years building and scaling enterprise SaaS. Led UI platform modernization and global design system adoption to deliver unified, accessible user experiences; partnered with product/design to accelerate delivery, cut costs, and improve global adoption.

positions.title: Engineering Manager – UI Platform & Design Systems
highlights: Lead a centralized UI Platform organization to standardize front-end architecture and design-system foundations across Okta's acquired and core products, enabling faster integration of newly acquired product surfaces.
Lead and scale distributed org of 16 engineers (US & Canada) across 4 teams; 1 EM; responsible for hiring, performance, and org design.
Delivered multi-quarter UI modernization initiative across dozens of product teams, reducing legacy UI by establishing shared React foundations, migration tooling for 200+ UI modules.

Scaled adoption of Odyssey (Shared react design system), standardizing UI foundations and cutting duplicated component implementations across teams by establishing reusable primitives and contribution guidelines.
Shipped GA unified navigation framework across multiple Okta product surfaces, improving cross-product discoverability.
Fostered a platform-first culture and improved accessibility compliance across Okta products and strengthened product adoption globally.

positions.title: Principal Software Engineer / Tech Lead – Globalization
highlights: Technical lead for internationalization architecture across end-user and admin products.

Defined company-wide internationalization architecture (message extraction, globalization testing framework, locale fallbacks, and translation delivery pipeline) adopted across 60+ UI repos powering end-user and admin products.
Expanded product language support to 29 locales by implementing a scalable localization pipeline, reducing localization regressions during releases.
Partnered with PM, Design, and Localization Ops to operationalize scalable localization workflows.
Mentored other engineers and hosted bi-weekly architecture office hours.

positions.title: Staff Software Engineer – UI Core Platform
highlights: Led localization tooling and shared infrastructure initiatives for Okta Identity Engine.
Defined extensibility patterns and reusable UI primitives adopted across multiple teams.
Influenced front-end modernization strategy transitioning legacy systems toward scalable React architecture.

positions.title: Senior Software Engineer – Identity Experience
highlights: Co-led next-generation end-user sign-in experience on Okta Identity Engine.
Delivered admin customization capabilities including email templating.
Owned internationalization of end-user applications supporting global expansion.

positions.title: Software UI Engineer
highlights: Senior Software engineer on core ATS product.
Improved ATS dashboard performance by ~50% by re-architecting data loading and rendering paths (API aggregation, caching, and UI rendering optimizations) to reduce time-to-interactive for recruiters.
Built reusable AngularJS component library accelerating front-end development across the company.
